data.body:
EPIC COMPLETE (config-loop). Configuration refinement is fully landed and the last child (0ac6) is closed, per the user decision "implement 0ac6, THEN close a621".

WHAT SHIPPED (all 11 children closed):
- 744e ADR (docs/config.md design-of-record); 252e typed Config (stdlib dataclass, full key inventory, coerce/validate/alias/loud-unknown-key); 43a0 loader (tomllib + upward discovery + hand-rolled XDG + sparse-merge layering); fe78 routed the verify gate + ticket.display_mode through load_config and RETIRED both inline parsers (fail-closed verify gate preserved); c647 `rebar config` transparency; 83e6 back-compat alias window; e211 perf (cached/bounded resolution, no hot-path regression); f81a docs sweep.
- Env-var standardization story 60ce (EV-1..EV-4): REBAR_<KEY> standardization with deprecation alias windows, dead-var removal, REBAR_LLM_RUNNER derivation.
- Two discovered follow-ups: cdd4 (the `rebar -c SECTION.KEY=VALUE` git -c-style CLI precedence layer) CLOSED; 0ac6 (route reconciler.*/jira.*/llm.* config-FILE keys + ticket_clarity through the typed Config) CLOSED — its 4 slices: ticket_clarity (2f8faa9d), reconciler.* (8b4d797f), jira.* (287788df, also LIVE-validated against the Jira DIG project), llm.* (48783029), docs (25da9388).

RESULT vs the epic's Success/Acceptance Criteria:
- ONE typed Config source of truth; ALL config-file reads route through load_config (the inline parsers are retired; the last bespoke .rebar/config.conf reads — ticket_clarity + rebar_id_guard_mode — are folded into the typed loader). llm.* is the one deliberate exception (reserved section resolved by LLMConfig.from_env so the stdlib core never imports the agents extra) but still uses the core discovery.
- TOML ([tool.rebar] + rebar.toml) via tomllib, upward discovery + XDG user fallback (no platformdirs); documented precedence CLI > REBAR_<KEY> env > project > user > defaults, enforced by the single resolver + the `rebar -c` flag.
- Loud unknown-key handling (warn → error via REBAR_CONFIG_UNKNOWN_KEYS); fail-CLOSED verify gate preserved + regression-tested; back-compat: legacy .rebar/config.conf + every renamed env var honored as a deprecated alias with a warning.
- stdlib-only core (dependencies = []; tomllib only, no pydantic-settings/platformdirs); config files are working-tree content, not events.
- OSS best-practices validation (vs ruff/black/mypy/pytest/pip/uv/hatch/poetry/coverage/pydantic-settings + PEP 518/621/680) rated rebar's config ABOVE the OSS median.

VERIFICATION: full offline suite green throughout (final 2049 passed); ruff check+format clean; per-slice subagent reviews clean; jira.* additionally validated LIVE against DIG (reconcile dry-run + link round-trip). Store health clean (fsck + validate).

Remaining non-blocking follow-up (NOT part of this epic): 3b92 — route bridge_fsck's one out-of-scope AcliClient site through the jira config layer.
